summary: D-1 Closing Ratio ETF→Futures feature fully verified. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). GET /api/gamma/ratio/MNQ returns ratio=41.253121, source=d1_close, futures_close=24132.25, etf_close=584.98, is_roll_period=false. GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ correctly includes gamma_ratio, gamma_ratio_source, is_roll_period in nivel_1. Frontend displays 'Ratio ETF→Futures: 41.2531x (D-1)' with correct source indicator. Roll period badge correctly NOT shown in April. Gamma fallback warning appears when yfinance is rate-limited (weekend expected behavior).
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/gamma/ratio/MNQ — caching works (2nd call uses cached data)
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ — nivel_1 contains using_fallback_gamma and gamma_warning
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ — context contains call_wall, put_wall, zgl (converted with D-1 ratio)
✅ MongoDB caching — ratio stored with computed_for=2026-04-05
✅ Frontend: N1 Gamma panel shows 'Ratio ETF→Futures: 41.2531x (D-1)'
✅ Frontend: Roll period badge NOT visible (correct for April)
✅ Frontend: Gamma fallback warning visible when yfinance rate-limited (expected on weekend)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using real DataBento D-1 close data + yfinance ETF close
context_for_next_testing_agent: D-1 Closing Ratio feature tested. The gamma_ratio_service fetches previous day's closing prices from DataBento (futures continuous contract .v.0) and yfinance (ETF). Ratio is cached in MongoDB gamma_ratios collection. On weekends, yfinance may be rate-limited causing gamma to fall back to price_estimated source (spot=100), which triggers using_fallback_gamma=true. The D-1 ratio itself (from DataBento) works correctly even on weekends. Roll period detection flags Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec 3rd week (days 10-21). Current month April is NOT a roll period.

feature_verification.d1_ratio_endpoint: Working - /api/gamma/ratio/{symbol} returns ratio, source, futures_close, etf_close
feature_verification.d1_close_source: Working - DataBento continuous contract .v.0 provides futures D-1 close
feature_verification.etf_close_source: Working - yfinance provides ETF D-1 close
feature_verification.mongodb_caching: Working - ratio cached by symbol+computed_for date
feature_verification.in_memory_caching: Working - second call uses cached data
feature_verification.nivel_1_integration: Working - gamma_ratio, gamma_ratio_source, is_roll_period in nivel_1
feature_verification.context_gamma_walls: Working - call_wall, put_wall, zgl converted with D-1 ratio

mocked_api_note: DataBento D-1 close is REAL data. yfinance may be rate-limited on weekends causing gamma fallback (expected behavior). The D-1 ratio calculation works correctly regardless of yfinance status.
